name: vicky
description: Demand-driven KB: research fetches + auto-learns; learn drains pending; research-gap detects misses.

systemPrompt.text: Vicky KB active. For knowledge questions: use research-gap. Returns context or auto-enqueues a pending stub. Run /vicky:research "<topic>" to fetch new data and absorb in one step, or /vicky:learn to drain pending without fetching.
